Package com.honeywell.rfidservice.rfid

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    OnTagReadListener
    In asynchronous inventory working mode, it is used to returns the data of the inventoried tag in real time.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AntennaPower
    This class stores the read power and write power of one RFID antenna.
    Gen2  
    RfidReader
    This class encapsulates all tag-related operations.
    TagReadData
    Tag data structure.
    TagReadOption
    Specifies what types of data need to be returned when performing asynchronous mode inventory.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    Gen2.LockBank
    This enum is used to identify which bank is performed on the tag while we are trying to lock/unlock one tag.
    Gen2.LockType
    This enum is used to identify which lock operation is performed on the tag while we are trying to lock/unlock one tag.
    Gen2.Session
    Session mode for the EPC Class-1 Gen-2 compliant tag.
    Region
    Region band.
    TagAdditionData
    Specifies the addition data type need to be returned.
  • Exception Summary 
    Exception Description
    RfidReaderException
